title: Wither Spawn Animation
description: An animation that plays when a Wither is spawning
body:
![Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vr6UqBIT/images/13c397884419b54541e6f69bfe28111fa30e19f4.png) **YOU NEED [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)** **This mod adds an animation after a Wither altar has been built, to make players feel more involved in the game and actually feel that a Boss Battle is about to come, instead of the boring, usual, immediate spawn of the Wither, that makes it feel useless.** (You can disable the animation with the command: "/gamerule witherSpawnAnimation false" but this won't take effect on already built altars) **Important:** -This mod is NOT compatible with "[Wither Spawn Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-fix)", but if you still want both the spawn animation and the spawn fix you can install "[Wither Spawn Fix W.S.A. Compatible](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-fix-wsa-compatible)"
### **IN THIS VIDEO THERE IS A GRAPHICAL BUG IN THE ANIMATION THAT IS NOW FIXED**

**Works with Cracker's Wither Storm Mod too!**
**[Wither Spawn Fix W.S.A. Compatible](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-fix-wsa-compatible)** **[Excalibur resource pack compatibility](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal-withergolem-spawn-animation)! (by Ruseky)** **Also try [Golem Spawn Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/golem-spawn-animation)!** **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wither-spawn-animation)**
